ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course (e.g., Japanese Beginner) */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., Language, Culture, Exam Prep) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "course_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in weeks or months */,
  "course_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the course */,
  "course_requirements" TEXT /* Prerequisites or requirements for the course */,
  "course_materials" TEXT /* List of materials or resources provided for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the batch belongs to */,
  "batch_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the batch (e.g., B2-0706-Eve-City) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the batch (e.g., Every Wed 7pm-9pm) */,
  "physical_fee" TEXT /* Physical fee for the batch */,
  "online_fee" TEXT /* Online fee for the batch */,
  "batch_location" TEXT /* Location of the physical batch */,
  "batch_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the batch */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., Open, Closed, In Progress) */,
  "batch_instructor" TEXT /* Name of the primary instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "trainer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the trainer */,
  "trainer_bio" TEXT /* Biography or background information about the trainer */,
  "trainer_experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  "trainer_specializations" TEXT /* Specializations or areas of expertise */,
  "trainer_certifications" TEXT /* Certifications or qualifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_trainers" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer assigned to the batch */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trainer in the batch (e.g., Primary, Assistant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id", "trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "student_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "student_address" TEXT /* Address of the student for communication purposes */,
  "student_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "student_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "student_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batch_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the batch */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., Active, Withdrawn) */,
  "enrollment_payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the enrollment (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_enrollments_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batch_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES batch_enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the evaluation is for */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was submitted */,
  "evaluation_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "evaluation_comment" TEXT /* Comments provided by the student */,
  "evaluation_category" TEXT /* Category of the evaluation (e.g., Course Content, Instructor, Overall) */,
  "evaluation_anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the evaluation is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Trainer, Student) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "role_start_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned the role */,
  "role_end_date" TEXT /* Date the user's role ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_activation_status" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainer_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "availability_date" TEXT /* Date the trainer is available */,
  "availability_time" TEXT /* Time the trainer is available */,
  "availability_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the availability (e.g., specific conditions or preferences) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainer_availability_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)
